enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his first solo motorbike ride around Boulder, Colorado, covering mountain roads and trails including Four Mile Canyon, Sunshine Canyon, Peak to Peak, Switzerland Trail, and Sourdough Trail. He recounts picking up a hitchhiker, a minor traffic incident, and some motorcycle maintenance issues including a melted headlight.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: exciting and empowering, even while high
pleasantly surprised by how many cool trails allow motorbikes

stances.topic: getting a ticket on his first legal day
stances.position: figures it would be unfair but accepts the risk casually

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got really high after returning from his first solo motorbike ride.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle woke up at around nine or ten in the morning.

claims.subject: Japstown
claims.claim: Japstown is inaccessible unless you live there.

claims.subject: Japstown
claims.claim: Half of the road to Japstown was dirt, which was unusual for Kyle because it used to be perfectly paved.

claims.subject: Japstown
claims.claim: The road to Japstown was damaged due to a flood.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rode up Four Mile Canyon, which was also in poor condition.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rode up Skillet, a steep road, and his motorcycle performed strongly.

claims.subject: Skillet
claims.claim: Skillet is a steep road with a gradient of around 13%.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rode up to Peak to Peak and discovered a new trail he had never ridden before.

claims.subject: Switzerland Trail
claims.claim: Kyle rode the Switzerland Trail, which had a super steep section that he managed to climb quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got gas and then rode to the town of Aldora.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rode to the end of the 4th of July Trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle tried to use his hot stone device, but the battery was dead.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle smoked more than he thought he did and got really high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes he could ride a motorbike while high if he went slowly on a trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle encountered rain while riding and had to stop.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle picked up an old hitchhiker who was trying to get back to Boulder.

claims.subject: Hitchhiker
claims.claim: The hitchhiker was angry because he had been standing for half an hour without anyone stopping for him.

claims.subject: Hitchhiker
claims.claim: The hitchhiker had never ridden a motorbike before and didn't have a helmet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle dropped the hitchhiker off just as he entered Boulder to avoid getting a ticket.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle experienced heavy traffic for the first time while riding his motorbike.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had to make a left turn at a red light and let another car go straight.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes he avoided getting a ticket because it was his first full day of being legal.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rode up to Aldora and the Sourdough Trail.

claims.subject: Sourdough Trail
claims.claim: Kyle encountered a man with long hair who confirmed that the trail was open to motorbikes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle noticed that his right light was dangling near the exhaust pipe and was partially melted.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle continued his ride despite the damaged light.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle returned home to find the light completely melted off.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle needs to buy a new bulb and figure out how to reattach the left light.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to fix the light and secure other loose parts tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle recorded some GoPro footage of his ride and plans to compile a video.

transcript.text: Hello, vlogging. I'm really high. I just got really high after I just got back from my motorbike ride,
My very first motocross bike ride by myself. That was fun. I got up at like 9 or something,
Left at like 10 or something like that. Went up to James, tried to go to Jamestown,
But Jamestown, you can't go there unless you live there. And it seemed like half of the road was
Dirt going up there, which is like crazy for me because ever since I was a little kid,
I've ride my bike up to Jamestown and it was always perfectly paved. And now it's like going,
Like going through Nepal or something because of the flood. And then we went up, I went up
Four Mile Canyon and that was really nasty too. But, but then I went up Lick Skillet,
Which is really steep. But my motorcycle, dude, it's so strong. It just goes,
Meh, you can go like 50 miles an hour up a road that's like, oh man, I want to know how steep that
Is. It's like 13% or something. Uh, and then went down, uh, sunshine, saw some cool thing,
Cool like place. That would be a cool place to have a picnic. And then went back up and, uh,
To peak to peak, but then saw this trail and did this trail I'd never done in my life up to, uh,
Um, um, uh, Switzerland, which was really cool. Cause it was, there's this one section that was
Super steep that I gunned it up in a second and, uh, just bounced up this whole, this thing and
It was like this. It was cool. And then got some gas and then went up to, uh, town of Eldora and then
Up to the end of 4th of July trail. And, um, um, but, uh, and then went back and tried to get
Hot stoned, but my, uh, little thing, my little hash pin, like the battery was dead. I thought it
Was full. I don't know. Maybe it was the button kept getting pushed. No, I guess I just smoked more
Than I thought I did or something. I don't know. But, um, but man, if I was, man, I'm really high
Now. If I had to ride a motorbike this high, that'd be fun. If you're going slow and on a trail,
Then I had to, I wanted to go over the Moffitt Tunnel and to, um, um, Winter Park, but it started
To rain. So I came home and there's this old dude hitchhiking, um, trying to go back to, on
Netherland, trying to go back to Boulder. So I stopped to pick him up and he didn't expect him to be like,
What? And he's like, yeah, you want to ride? But, um, and he's, he was all pissed off. He's like,
I've been standing here for a fucking half hour. Nobody picked me up. And, uh, but he, I guess
He'd never ridden a motorbike before. And, uh, but then I remembered after I started driving him
That he didn't have a helmet and I didn't want to get a ticket. So, um, and it was raining, but,
Um, but just a little bit. Um, so I dropped him off, like right when I came into Boulder. So that
A cop wouldn't see me. And then, uh, yeah. So I had my first traffic experience today.
There's a lot of traffic. Um, yeah, I got, but then I, I think I wiggled through a cool
Place, you know, without traffic and had to take a left at this red and yeah, I saw this
Other car gunned it at the very last second to go straight. And so I let them go and then
I went and turned and gunned it. So I don't know, maybe, I guess a cop could have given
Me a ticket. I figured today's my birthday because it's my first day legal. So I guess
The yesterday was officially, but that was like four in the afternoon. So today's my first
Full day. So if you get pulled over or whatever on your first full day, you know, you'd be like,
That's my first day though. Don't you let it slide on the first day? Oh, but when I went
Up to, uh, Eldora, I went up to a sourdough trail, so funny. And there's this, uh, this
Stoned dude, like long hair, like walked out of his house. And like, I, before I even said
Anything to him, he goes, maybe he heard me because there was this delivery guy and I was
Like, is this thing open to motorbikes? And he, anyway, he comes up to me, he's like, yeah,
I had a month as soon as, as soon as the, um, the snow thaws, but he was like talking
So slow, dude. It was just stereotypical, like out there mountain dude. But, uh, so I went
Up to the, he's like, yeah, there's this gate there. So I went up to the gate, but the trail
Was awesome. I haven't ridden that trail for like 20 years or something. And, uh, it's
Like so small and just fucking, um, but yeah, it's open to motorcycles. So I'm like, oh my
God. Yeah, dude, there's going to be a lot of cool trails open to motorbikes. It's too
Bad it rained, but I noticed right after four, I went my, my, my lights dangled. My right
Light was dangling. I thought it wasn't a big deal, but I didn't realize that that's right
Next to the exhaust pipe, which is really hard, hot. And when I was up in, um, sunshine,
I saw it and like half of it was melted off, but it still worked. Um, so I continued my
Ride, which is over a lot of bouncy shit and everything. And then I came home and the whole
Light fixture itself was like frozen off, melted off. So I have to go buy another bulb and hopefully
It'll still work. And if it does, oh, and then the left side fell down and was dangling.
So I need to figure out a way to attach them again. Um, that's the only thing though. And
Then there's something else loose inside, but I'm near the engine to find out what that
Is and secure it. But so maybe I'll do that tomorrow. But ha dude, this is some fun shit
Though, man. I'll, I'll compile a little video. I did a little bit of GoPro, shot a little bit
Of video. So I'll put a little video at the end. Peace out. There's the flooded out section
Of the road.
